spec.name: regional_shard_readers
spec.description: Spawn 6 parallel helper agents, one per region, each reading its own sales shard and returning that region's total.

agents.task: Read <REPO>/cgb_results/v0941_claude_opus_4_8_work/subagent-01-budget-regions__pull__claude_opus_4_8__t0/workspace/sales_eu.txt and return the EU total.
Read <REPO>/cgb_results/v0941_claude_opus_4_8_work/subagent-01-budget-regions__pull__claude_opus_4_8__t0/workspace/sales_us.txt and return the US total.
Read <REPO>/cgb_results/v0941_claude_opus_4_8_work/subagent-01-budget-regions__pull__claude_opus_4_8__t0/workspace/sales_apac.txt and return the APAC total.
Read <REPO>/cgb_results/v0941_claude_opus_4_8_work/subagent-01-budget-regions__pull__claude_opus_4_8__t0/workspace/sales_latam.txt and return the LATAM total.
Read <REPO>/cgb_results/v0941_claude_opus_4_8_work/subagent-01-budget-regions__pull__claude_opus_4_8__t0/workspace/sales_mea.txt and return the MEA total.
Read <REPO>/cgb_results/v0941_claude_opus_4_8_work/subagent-01-budget-regions__pull__claude_opus_4_8__t0/workspace/sales_anz.txt and return the ANZ total.

request.rationale: The objective explicitly requires delegating the 6 independent shards to parallel helper agents (one per region) rather than reading them serially myself. Each shard holds an unguessable total, so each helper must read its own file and report back. I will collate the returned totals into total.txt.

subagent.task: The objective explicitly requires delegating the 6 independent shards to parallel helper agents (one per region) rather than reading them serially myself. Each shard holds an unguessable total, so each helper must read its own file and report back. I will collate the returned totals into total.txt.
